task_completion.description: Verify 'Attention Is All You Need' is classified as a Conference Paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Attention Is All You Need' in the Zotero item list. Verify that its icon indicates a Conference Paper, or if selected, the right pane shows 'Item Type: Conference Paper'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' is classified as a Conference Paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' in the Zotero item list. Verify that its icon indicates a Conference Paper, or if selected, the right pane shows 'Item Type: Conference Paper'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' is classified as a Conference Paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ImageNet Classification...' in the Zotero item list. Verify that its icon indicates a Conference Paper, or if selected, the right pane shows 'Item Type: Conference Paper'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' is classified as a Book
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' in the Zotero item list. Verify that its icon indicates a Book (a book icon), or if selected, the right pane shows 'Item Type: Book'.

task_completion.description: Verify no other items were changed from 'Journal Article'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the other items in the Zotero list. Verify that their icons still indicate 'Journal Article' (typically a white page with text lines) and have not been changed to other types.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application interface being used, such as clicking on items and changing types via the dropdown in the right pane.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to modify the Zotero database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows or code editors open showing SQL commands or scripts modifying the zotero.sqlite file.

integrity.description: The screenshots show the actual Zotero application running
integrity.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window should be visible with its standard layout (left pane for collections, middle for items, right for metadata).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires reclassifying four specific items in Zotero. 'Attention Is All You Need', 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition', and 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' must be changed to 'Conference Paper' (25 points each). 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' must be changed to 'Book' (15 points). All other items must remain as 'Journal Article' (10 points for no collateral damage). In Zotero, item types can be verified by the icon next to the title in the list view or the 'Item Type' field in the right pane.
